name: Wasteland V2
description:
A vast wasteland filled with towns and settlements, factions and gangs, good and bad people, feral creatures that want to kill you, and radiation all around.

[TW] Non-con, Rape, Slavery, and other sexual acts. There will be non consensual rape, enslavement, mutations against you, and a variety of other things that can happen to you, with that knowledge proceed and enjoy the bot to your best ability.
creator: Darkshowdow700
